title: Container Report - Week 32
summary:
Main
This week, key container shipping routes have all lost some ground, with the headline Baltic Exchange Container Freight Index (FBX) dropping by $213 or approximately 9%. Ongoing tariff uncertainty continues to weigh on the market, particularly with speculation around a potential extension or development in the US-China trade talks. Liner companies have persisted in blanking sailings to stabilise rates, which appears to be yielding results as the rate decline is moderating.
